name: Nellie Cochrane
title: The Tattler

abilities.name: Never Miss a Deadline
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to heal 4.

abilities.name: Public Outcry
abilities.text: When this model is targeted by an attack action, if this crew's scandal bar is half full or more, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: The Pen is Mightier
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 8" resolves the Interact action, it is dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Exposé
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target gains a Slow token. This model may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2 to deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: On the Scene
triggers.text: Target declares the Interact action, controlled by this model.

actions.name: Journalistic Integrity
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This model may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2 to receive a raise.
actions.effects: Choose and apply one of the following effects, plus an additional effect for each raise, in an order of your choosing.

triggers.name: Chasing a Story
triggers.text: Allies within 2" of the target may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Dogged Pursuit
triggers.text: Target declares the Interact action, ignoring engagement.

actions.name: Slow News Day
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within 3" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.

extraction_notes: Journalistic Integrity has multiple text blocks describing its effect structure, which are all part of the effects text: the base effects are defined as a choice system with scaling based on raises.
